author: Lord Murugan
summary: A six-syllable mantra invoking Murugan as the divine guide.
meaningEn: The mantra is traditionally used for protection, clarity and devotional focus.
meaningTa: தமிழ் விளக்கம்: பக்தி, ஒழுக்கம், உள்ளமைதி, தெய்வ அருள் ஆகியவற்றை நினைவூட்டும் வழிகாட்டும் உரை.

sections.heading: How to use
sections.body: Read with humility. Use the meaning as a learning guide, not as a substitute for a traditional teacher or verified source edition.

sections.heading: Parallel meaning
sections.body: Tamil and English meanings are intentionally concise and will be expanded after source review.
